sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling tired and experiencing swollen joints in his elbows, which are painful. He also reports nausea and a lack of appetite. He describes a bull's-eye rash on his abdomen.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals swelling in the elbows bilaterally, with tenderness to palpation. A bull's-eye rash is noted on the left abdomen, which is warm to the touch. Vital signs are stable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has newly diagnosed Lyme disease and reports symptoms consistent with its progression. He also has type 2 diabetes and hypertension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I am prescribing doxycycline 100mg twice daily for three weeks. I have ordered a hemoglobin A1c to monitor his diabetes management. I am continuing him on lisinopril 10mg daily. I have ordered a lipid panel. I will schedule a follow-up appointment next week to discuss these findings.
